semantic.role: Type definition module establishing the contract for view artifacts in the ArchSpine view generation system.
responsibilities: Defines TypeScript interfaces for view artifact envelopes and their content structures
Provides type aliases for view identifiers (ViewId, ViewType) and view-specific enumerations
Establishes the schema for architecture diagram specifications including nodes, edges, and summary cards
Defines the structure for public surface view items and risk hotspot view items
outOfScope: Serialization or persistence of view artifacts
invariants: All view artifact data structures must conform to the defined TypeScript interfaces
ViewType is an alias for ViewId, ensuring consistency across the system

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, strongly-typed contract for view artifacts to ensure consistency across view generation modules and consumers.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of a broader refactoring to split view generators into focused modules; this file likely serves as the stable type foundation for those modules.

ruleViolations.reason: Interfaces exported from this file (ViewScoreContribution, PublicSurfaceViewItem, RiskHotspotViewItem, ArchDiagramNode, ArchDiagramEdge, ArchDiagramSummaryCard, ArchDiagramSpec) do not start with the required 'I' prefix, violating the internal interface naming rule.
